title: astragalus campestris
intro: Astragalus campestris, also known as the field milkvetch or summer milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, and is believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Astragalus campestris include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Astragalus campestris can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
